headline: Dealing With a Boss Who ignores Your Respiratory Complaints
articleBody: Chemical exposure isn't always a one-time splash; it’s often the slow buildup of fumes that does the real damage. You shouldn't have to choose between your health and a paycheck. If your employer isn't providing the right masks or ventilation, you have rights. Professional legal help is key when companies ignore safety standards. Call us at 801-746-0290 to see how we can help you recover.
